name: conduit-realworld-example-app
description: RealWorld example app, created to demonstrate a fully fledged fullstack application built with React / Express.js / Sequelize / PostgreSQL including CRUD operations, authentication, routing, pagination, and more.

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "Node,Vite" -c "green,blue" "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.pre-commit: npm run format && npm run lint
scripts.start: npm run build -w frontend && npm run start -w backend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w backend && npm run test -w frontend -- --coverage
scripts.setup: docker compose up -d && npm run sqlz -- db:create && npm run sqlz -- db:migrate && npm run sqlz -- db:seed:all
scripts.app: npm run setup && npm run dev
